articles.title: New chemical kills 95% of termites without harming humans
articles.description: Scientists may have found a smarter, safer way to wipe out termites hiding inside homes. articles.title: Letters for May 2, 2026: ‘If only Quebec had oil, we would have all the pipelines.’
articles.description: Alberta dairy, Quebec oil Geography is a fickle mistress. World oil prices are up as Iran controls a small strait. articles.description: Lake Powell, the second-largest human-made reservoir in the US, has lost nearly 7% of its potential storage capacity since 1963, when Glen Canyon Dam was built, a new report shows.
